applicationName.description: Optional explicit name for the rendered ArgoCD Application. Defaults to a per-cluster derived name to avoid collisions when deployed to multiple clusters.

config.description: Optional MACHINERY_CONFIG injection. Set `content` for inline JSON, or `fromConfigMap` to reference one materialized out-of-band. Both unset = machinery uses its built-in defaultConfig().

name.description: Name of the materialized ConfigMap. Defaults to `machinery-config-file` (distinct from the env-vars `machinery-config` that the KCL base ships). Only meaningful with `content`.

content.description: Inline JSON config (machinery's config.json schema). The chart auto-creates a ConfigMap via the apps/machinery/configmap sub-Application.

fromConfigMap.description: Name of a ConfigMap pre-existing in the destination namespace carrying a `config.json` key. Use instead of `content` when something else (ESO / Kyverno / manual) populates the ConfigMap.

nudgeAfterSync.description: Pass-through to the httproute sub-chart's PostSync nudge hook. Defaults to true. See values.yaml for the rationale.
Pass-through to the grpcroute sub-chart's PostSync nudge hook. Defaults to true. See values.yaml for the rationale.

auth.description: gRPC bearer-token auth (machinery#56). When enabled:true, the chart folds these fields into the rendered MACHINERY_CONFIG JSON. Default off.

token.description: Inline token; test/dev/preview only — visible in the ConfigMap.

tokenFile.description: Path to a Secret-mounted token file. Secret-mounting itself is tracked in the follow-up KCL change.

tokenEnvVar.description: Custom env var name; machinery defaults to MACHINERY_AUTH_TOKEN when this is unset.

rbac.description: Optional cluster-scoped RBAC for the machinery SA. Without it the SA can't list most kinds and the dashboard error-loops.

rules.description: ClusterRole rules. apiGroups + resources required; verbs default to get/list/watch.

syncPolicy.description: ArgoCD sync policy applied to all rendered Applications.
